Video.summary: A suspicious driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a funny walking motorist is hiding something in his shoe.
Video.title: Uncomfortable Shoes

Video.summary: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.
Video.title: Crawling to Vegas

Video.summary: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman. A man doesn’t deal with being laughed at by his neighbor in a peaceful way.
Video.title: Nightvision

Video.summary: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.
Video.title: Allergy Season

Video.summary: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man under the influence causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.
Video.title: Keep it Down!

Video.summary: Detectives chase a suspect who wrecks his car. Police are called when a man headbutts his neighbor. Officers tend to a woman punched in the face by her husband while on the bus.
Video.title: What's Your Deductible?

Video.summary: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.
Video.title: Read the Signs

Video.summary: A suspect flees from police and attempts to hide contraband from them. A driver is pulled over and is literally covered in his crimes. An employee of a cell phone store attempts to scam the police and her employers.
Video.title: Wearing My Crime

Video.summary: The pursuit of a criminal driver ends in a fire and police rescue. Police track down an elusive suspect. A family dispute over cleaning a garage ends with the police being called.
Video.title: A Song of Fire and Cleaning

Image.alt: A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning

Video.summary: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.
Video.title: Blame my Man

Video.summary: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.
Video.title: He's the Gingerbread Man

Video.summary: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old’s walker.
Video.title: No Respect these Days

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter’s boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.
Video.title: Candlelight Burglar

Video.summary: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.
Video.title: Hauling Away

Video.summary: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.
Video.title: Hide and Seek

Video.summary: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man’s pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.
Video.title: Rocks Are Cool

Video.summary: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.
Video.title: Being Honest Goes Along Way

Video.summary: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.
Video.title: Four Legs Beats Two Legs

Video.summary: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An Officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.
Video.title: Slow Mo’ Drag Racer

Video.summary: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.
Video.title: That’s Not Ours

Video.summary: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells Deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.
Video.title: Bruised But Not Broken

Video.summary: A couple flees a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.
Video.title: Time to Climb

Video.summary: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”
Video.title: Coco the Clown

Video.summary: Officers arrange a sting to capture bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer stops a vehicle after witnessing a prostitute get inside.
Video.title: An Unfortunate Cycle

Video.summary: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a convenience store. Dispatch informs officers that a man threatened an elderly woman.
Video.title: Traveling Fast

Video.summary: Officers recover a small bag of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.
Video.title: Multiple Identities

Video.summary: A woman hides in her apartment after she skips out on paying her cab fare. A knife fight results in multiple calls to the police for help. A French tourist get a bus ride from Hell in Florida.
Video.title: No Money, More Problems

Video.summary: A man on the corner is questioned when he’s wearing gang colors in a gang neighborhood. A muscle car spins its tires at a stop light. A woman’s neighbor steals her ‘special’ plants.
Video.title: Rethink Your Wardrobe

Video.summary: Officers get more than they expected when they stop a cyclist and discover a deadly weapon. Four sons attempt to break into the family home after being banned. A homeowner claims he accidently fired five shots while cleaning a gun.
Video.title: Five Shots and Four Sons

Video.summary: Cops try desperately to get an unclothed man to cooperate. After a chase with a pickup truck, officers find a 14-year-old in the driver’s seat. On a routine traffic stop, police contend with a plethora of dope and even more lies.
Video.title: Put Your Clothes Back On

Video.summary: A speedy suspect makes officers chase him through a creek. A teenage Good Samaritan gets in the middle of a bizarre domestic dispute. After a woman destroys her home, she begs police to arrest her.
Video.title: Without a Paddle

Video.summary: A man’s wife can’t help him stay out of jail no matter how much he calls for her. One thief tries to give back his stolen loot. When approached by officers, a woman goes from passed out to out of control.
Video.title: Tell it to My Wife

Video.summary: A well-known local nuisance gets caught bothering people once again. Officers get a kick out of a usual suspect with money in his shoe. Cops try to make sense of a man who’s barely coherent and barely dressed.
Video.title: The One Dollar Shoe

Video.summary: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated man is jailed for domestic abuse. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.
Video.title: No Lesson Learned

Video.summary: During a routine traffice stop, an officer witnesses a cyclist get hit by a motorist. An officer investigates a domestic disturbance call involving some spousal infidelity. Authorities respond to a tip regarding a heavy weight drug dealer.
Video.title: You've Got Mail

Video.summary: An Officer struggles with a suspect after he appears to reach for a gun. When a car is parked on a desolate road, an officer conducts a routine search and discovers methamphetamine. A woman in a bikini is arrested for driving on a suspended license after an officer pulls her over for a busted tail light.
Video.title: Bikinis & Handcuffs

Video.summary: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.
Video.title: A Mother's Love

Video.summary: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering services is not who he thinks they are.
Video.title: Deceptive Dealings

Video.summary: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. The passenger of a vehicle is arrested for possession. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.
Video.title: Dog Eat Dog

Video.summary: An officer is attacked while attempting to break up a fight. Officers confiscate marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.
Video.title: I Want Charges

Video.summary: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over narcotics. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.
Video.title: My Better Half

Video.summary: Officers in Las Vegas make an arrest in a grand theft auto call with the help of the K9 unit. An uncooperative driver takes off in the middle of a traffic stop. A woman in Florida is rewarded for her honesty and is let go as her friends are arrested.
Video.title: Dumpster Dummy

Video.summary: Officers conduct a traffic stop and the vehicle’s occupants are taken into custody. An officer investigates a suspicious vehicle occupied by two women who turn on each other during questioning. An informant tips authorities off about drug activity at a shady motel.
Video.title: Dumbfounded

Video.summary: Officers rescue a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow-speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with extraction from a car. An officer assists in an apartment fire.
Video.title: Team Rescue

Video.summary: Officers investigate a fiasco at a fast food restaurant. A routine pullover results in a drug possession arrest. A vehicular pursuit results in an ill fated foot chase, the suspect is taken to jail for an outstanding warrant.
Video.title: Take out Orders

Video.summary: An Officer spots a gun in a vehicle during a routine traffic stop, but the passengers are denying ownership. An intoxicated woman assaults her step-father with a butter knife after he refuses to take her to the hospital for spider bites. A man denies vandalizing a building even though there's evidence on his fingers.
Video.title: Butter Cutter

Video.summary: A stolen vehicle investigation results in a brief foot chase and subsequent arrest. A driver is pulled over and is arrested for the possession of a controlled substance. While on patrol an officer spots an distressed man inside a vehicle with busted windows.
Video.title: Tuck and Roll, Hold On!

Video.summary: Officers find drugs after pursuing a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car. Officers intervene in a domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.
Video.title: School Zone Chase

Video.summary: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.
Video.title: Life Changing Moment

Video.summary: An investigation involving two suspicious men in parked cars results in a foot chase and drug bust. An officer responds to a domestic call involving a threatening exhusband who is taken into custody. Officers in Florida question a deceptive and drug using couple.
Video.title: Riding Dirty

Video.summary: Cops use cameras to track a suspected motorbike thief. A K-9 unit surveys a hilltop when officers suspect a man of wrongdoing. A concerned citizen steps in to stop a pair of would-be mail thieves.
Video.title: Front Door Felony

Video.summary: A defiant motorist can’t believe it when his mother sides with the law. Deputies discover a man in a strange costume during a traffic stop. Officers protect a hardworking mom from sudden visitors.
Video.title: Mother Knows Best

Video.summary: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn. Officers are forced to intervene when a jilted lover can’t take a hint. A nervous man attempts to hide his crime.
Video.title: One, Two, Tree

Video.summary: An evasive driver tells the police that he’s the victim of a very bad girl. A pregnant lady makes some questionable choices. A robbery suspect finds some comfort in coming clean.
Video.title: The Naked Truth

Video.summary: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser. A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he’s a good guy. Deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Wake Up Call

Video.summary: A suspect claims he would have gotten away with his crime if it hadn't been for his girlfriend. Officers are called when a mother’s job hunt unravels. Deputies confront a nervous man with bad habits.
Video.title: Bikini Brawl
